heading: CARRIAGE OF PASSENGERS
label: 35 CARRIAGE OF PASSENGERS
notes: Historical and Revision NotesChapter 35 consolidates the laws that have specific application to the carriage of passengers. They provide special provisions for listing and counting the number of passengers on board a vessel, for notifying the general public of the safety standards that are applicable, and for related control measures.
